name: Heart Attack Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate over very low heat in the top of a double boiler.
2. Whisk in 1.25 cups of superfine sugar until dissolved.
3. Add butter and stir often until melted and combined with the chocolate mixture.
4. Remove from heat and whisk in Grand Marnier.
5. Whip egg yolks until light and fluffy.
6. Gradually add the chocolate mixture to the yolks, whipping constantly until fully incorporated.
7. Set aside.
8. Whip egg whites into a foamy state, then gradually add 1/4 cup of superfine sugar while continuing to whip until stiff peaks form.
9. Gently fold the whipped egg whites and remaining sugar into the chocolate yolk mixture until smooth.
10. Pour batter into a buttered and floured 12-inch spring form pan.
11. Bake at 275°F for 3 hours.
12. Let cool for 20 minutes, then invert onto a plate and remove from the pan.
13. Dust with powdered sugar and serve with vanilla sauce and/or raspberry puree if desired.
